title: 실패 복구 가이드 + diagnose.sh 진단 스크립트
scope_note: Original scope was doc-only (6/10). User requested enhancement — added diagnose.sh covering all 5 scenarios with exit-code-based detection, raising score to 9/10.

fitness.rationale: diagnose.sh scans 5 failure states with single exit code; troubleshooting.md gives human-readable recovery with §numbering mapped to script checks

gate2_verdict: PASS (no regression; scoring dimensions untouched, diagnose.sh counted as script not hook)
applied_changes: src/docs/troubleshooting.md: new file, 5 scenarios (run-task mid-failure, Reviewer REQUEST_CHANGES loop, parallel slice conflict, hook failure, harvest lock stale), each with symptom/diagnosis command/recovery steps
src/scripts/diagnose.sh: new executable, scans 5 states, exit 0=clean / 1=issues-found, stderr lists issues with §ref to troubleshooting.md
